title: Golems Refreshed
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c90da438fa6317be7ec989965e2c8eebe26b2dc.png)

# About:
Golems Refreshed, formerly Good Golems, is a texture pack for the most recent versions of Minecraft that aims to completely refresh the Iron Golem in Minecraft with brand-new designs and more extra features. There are 26 brand new variants for the Iron Golem, spawning in all types of biomes or through name tags.

# Attention:
While Optifine is the more popular method of using CEM Packs, I would personally advise using Entity Model Features.

Download Entity Model Features for Forge/Fabric [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).


Many Biome Variant Golems are inspired by the works of Seth Pennigton on Instagram; [check them out!](https://www.instagram.com/seth_pennington_/?hl=en)

![All Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e1d3f2e31400838830445b87bfd0a03a8f3ae99_0.webp)
